subject: A petite female-presenting figure with large pink twin-tails in a purple-and-pink deity outfit gestures with one hand raised, depicted against a blue and teal energy backdrop — the same character as BT3-113 in a different pose.
suspected_ip: Supreme Kai of Time (Chronoa) — Dragon Ball Xenoverse / Dragon Ball Heroes
description: The card depicts a petite female-presenting figure recognizable by very large pink twin-tail hair and a purple-and-pink ceremonial outfit with white accents. The figure has one hand raised in a pointing or commanding gesture, the other arm lowered. The background is predominantly blue and teal with swirling energy, distinct from the magenta background of BT3-113. The composition is a mid-shot portrait. The character's expression appears determined and authoritative. The card name 'Time's Judgement' and the consistent visual match with the Supreme Kai of Time strongly reinforce the IP identification.
foreground: Petite deity figure with pink twin-tails, one hand raised in commanding gesture
emotion: Authoritative command — pointing gesture, determined expression
